attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSLPAT.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
NSLPAT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
NSLPAT.DSCNT_APPLD_AUTOMATICALLY_FLG, 
NSLPAT.PRICE_ADJ_CHANGE_REASON_CD, 
NSLPAT.BK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPAT.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT, 
NSLPAT.PRICE_ADJ_APPLICATION_MTHD_CD, 
NSLPAT.PRICE_ADJ_APPLIED_FLG, 
NSLPAT.SK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT, 
NSLPAT.SS_CD, 
NSLPAT.DISCOUNT_ROLE, 
NSLPAT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
NSLPAT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
NSLPAT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
NSLPAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
NSLPAT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQUEST_ID_INT, 
NSLPAT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQ_VER_NUM_INT, 
NSLPAT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_ID_INT, 
NSLPAT.RU_DSCNT_APLD_POST_TRM_PRD_FLG, 
NSLPAT.ADJSTD_PER_QTY_DSCNT_USD_AMT, 
NSLPAT.ADJSTD_USD_AMT, 
NSLPAT.LIST_LINE_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPAT.DSCNT_APPLD_LVL_CD, 
NSLPAT.DSCNT_VAL_PER_QTY_AMT, 
NSLPAT.DSCNT_PCT, 
NSLPAT.DSCNT_MODIFIER_KEY, 
NSLPAT.PROMOTION_CD, 
NSLPAT.PROMOTION_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPAT.CONTEXT_CD, 
NSLPAT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, 
NSLPAT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR, 
NSLPAT.SK_LIST_HEADER_ID_INT, 
NSLPAT.SK_LIST_LINE_ID_INT, 
NSLPAT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_CD, 
NSLPAT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DTM, 
NSLPAT.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DT, 
NSLPAT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DTM, 
NSLPAT.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DT, 
NSLPAT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_ACTION_CD, 
NSLPAT.CREDIT_CD,
NSLPAT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
NSLPAT.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_LCL_AMT
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TV NSLPAT
WHERE NSLPAT.SS_CD <> 'OPL' AND
NSLPAT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
